name: mytheme
description: A modern WHMCS client area theme.
author: Your Studio
comment: This file replaces filesystem-scan-with-Symfony-Finder discovery. The engine reads it once at startup and caches the result. Adding a new style or layout is: (1) add the directory under core/, (2) add its name to the appropriate list here, (3) bump version. The buyer's Configuration cache is invalidated on version bump.
